text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Not bad. In fact, I feel inspired to try
harder in my studies from here on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I give you the right to store my prize in your
office. What better way to decorate it than in
honor of me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Take good care of this new Halo Army recruit!
Ohohoho!
choice_data_list: I'm the one who won it...
I'm the one who won it...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't be so petty! That's not very first-rate
of you.
